title: Work at the U.S. Department of Energy
description: Join a dynamic team committed to driving innovation and securing our future.
text:
The Department of Energy (DOE) offers exciting careers, internship opportunities, and programs to gain skills that lead to jobs in the Energy Industry. Our mission speaks to all sectors of the economy. Whether your expertise is in science, technology, engineering, national security, international affairs, or business, only here do you have so many opportunities to make a positive difference in your community, your nation, and your world.
We also take pride in being one of the best places to work in the Federal Government according to the Partnership for Public Service. We are truly honored that DOE was named America's #1 Best Employer for Veterans in 2023 by Forbes—not only among Government agencies, but among employers across the U.S.
